27.reason: Error: Loop bound should be i<all to avoid calling next permutation on the last permutation, which leads to undefined behavior in get_A.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Loop runs from 1 to all inclusive; after the last permutation, the algorithm tries to compute a next permutation, causing get_A to fail (no return value). Should be i<all.
